allow: Bash(python -c "import sys, json; from pathlib import Path; print\(json.dumps\({'nodes':[],'edges':[],'input_tokens':0,'output_tokens':0}\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; from graphify.extract import collect_files, extract; from pathlib import Path; code_files = []; detect = json.loads\(Path\('.graphify_detect.json'\).read_text\(\)\); [code_files.extend\(collect_files\(Path\(f\)\) if Path\(f\).is_dir\(\) else [Path\(f\)]\) for f in detect.get\('files', {}\).get\('code', []\)]; result = extract\(code_files\) if code_files else {'nodes':[],'edges':[],'input_tokens':0,'output_tokens':0}; Path\('.graphify_ast.json'\).write_text\(json.dumps\(result, indent=2\)\)")
